prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-FACTK-63PC-ONE-BRSS-IR-TT Product Type: TOOLS Brand (from catalog): ToolTreaux Existing Title: ToolTreaux Brass Grommet Kit with Hole Punch Washers Pool and Tent Repair - 63pc Description: The ToolTreaux grommet kit comes with 63 pieces including 1 drop-forged zinc grommet punch, a drop-forged zinc hole punch, 30 .5” grommets and 30 .5” brass washers that are ideal for repairing pools, pool covers, tents, tarps and more.

Our grommets and washers are made of corrosion-resistant solid brass that will never rust. The thickened metal eyelets and washers will last through many uses. They’re easy to install too - just fix the durable brass grommet eyelets in place with the included installation tool and metal base.

Brass grommets are versatile pieces that are great for a number of different repairs including awnings, banners and lawn furniture. Keep this kit with your tools in case of a home improvement or garden repair job. Search Terms: grommet tool kit grommet kit grommet curtains grommet tool hole punch three hole punch leather hole punch single hole punch pool patch repair kit pool repair kit vinyl heavy duty tent repair awning repair pool cover above ground pool cover Features: - ASSORTED GROMMETS AND WASHERS - ToolTreaux grommet kit comes with 63 pieces including a drop forged zinc grommet punch, hole punch, base plate, 30 .5” brass grommets and 30 .5” brass washers; Ideal for repairing pools, tents, tarps and more - DURABLE MATERIAL - Solid brass grommets will never rust; made of thickened metal eyelets and washers that will last through many uses - EASY TO INSTALL - Fix the durable brass grommet eyelets in place with the included installation tool and metal base; Each grommet eyelet comes with a matching washer to ensure fit - VERSATILE TOOLS - Brass grommets are great for repairing awnings, banners, tarps, tents, lawn furniture and more; Keep this kit in case of a home improvement or garden repair need - SPECIFICATIONS - Material: solid brass; Number of pieces: 63; Rust-resistant: yes; Matching grommets and washers; Installation and base tool included === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ToolTreaux 63pc Brass Grommet Kit with Hole Punch

openai.item_name: ToolTreaux 63-pc Brass Grommet Kit with Hole Punch and Washers

tokens.name: Brass Grommet Kit with Hole Punch and Washers

anthropic.title_differentiation: 63 Pieces, Rust-Resistant Solid Brass, Installation Tools Included, Pool And Tent Repair

openai.title_differentiation: Solid Brass, Rust Resistant, 63 Piece Set, Includes Punch And Base Plate, Ideal For Pools, Tents, Tarps
